TextView.android:text: Countdown before task timer begins (mm-ss, 0–5 min)
Wait countdown after execute expires; 0s = skip (mm-ss, 0–5 min)
After wait, restart execute this many more times (0 = run once, max 12)
Middle: resume execute from last paused position. Initial: always restart execute from the beginning.
Fix this task's CPU share to an exact %
Leave empty to float automatically based on priority weight.
Max time allowed per period (like Linux cgroup quota)
Rolling window for the quota; resets automatically (1s–365d)
Override Linux scheduler class (default: EEVDF / fair)
⚠ stop_sched_class is a kernel-internal class for CPU migration tasks. Assigning it to user tasks may cause undefined behaviour.
How long the task may run per period
Relative deadline from period start; runtime must be ≤ deadline
Replenishment period; leave empty to default to deadline value
